version_description: This can be played on either acoustic or clean electric guitar,where chords are not so well known i have added instruction to top of tab,i have also included all chords and lyrics,whilst keeping it achievable to play with ease.https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zpOULjyy-n8.

versions.version_description: I saw this from zerobio youtube channel, it sounds great. Please go to: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Xwh00p1slWk.
Capo on the 1st fret to match original song.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
REO Speedwagon - I Cant Fight This Feeling          https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zpOULjyy-n8

[ch]Esus4[/ch]   022200
[ch]E/A[/ch]     x02100
[ch]D5[/ch]      xx023x
[ch]A/C#[/ch]    x40200  
    

   [Intro]
[ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]


   [Verse 1]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]E/A[/ch]         [ch]D5[/ch]  [ch]E/A[/ch]
I can't fight this feeling any longer.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]F#[/ch]               [ch]Esus4[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
And yet I'm still afraid to let it flow.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]A7[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]F#[/ch]
What started out as friendship,Has grown stronger.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Esus4[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
I only wish I had the strength to let it show.[/tab]


   [Verse 2]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]E/A[/ch]             [ch]D5[/ch]   [ch]E/A[/ch]
I tell myself that I can't hold out forever.[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]F#[/ch]            [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]E/A[/ch]
I said there is no reason for my fear.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]A7[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]F#[/ch]
Cause I feel so secure when we're together.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
You give my life direction,You make everything so    clear.[/tab]


   [Pre Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]C#m7[/ch]
And even as I wander,I'm keeping you in sight.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A/C#[/ch]
You're a candle in the window,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Esus4[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
On a cold, dark winter's night.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
And I'm getting closer than I ever thought I     might.[/tab]


    [Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]Bm7[/ch]                      
And I can't fight this feeling anymore.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]Bm7[/ch]
I've forgotten what I started fighting for.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Bm7[/ch]
It's time to bring this ship into the shore,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
And throw away the oars, forever.[/tab]


   [Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Cause I can't fight this feeling anymore.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Bm7[/ch]
I've forgotten what I started fighting for.                 [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Bm7[/ch]
And if I have to crawl upon the floor,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
Come crushing through your door,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Esus4[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
Baby, I can't fight this feeling anymore.[/tab]


   [Instrumental Break]
[ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E/A[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E/A[/ch]
[ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E/A[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E/A[/ch]


   [Verse 3]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]E/A[/ch]             [ch]D5[/ch]   [ch]E/A[/ch]
My life has been such a whirlwind since I saw you.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]                     [ch]F#[/ch]           [ch]Esus4[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
I've been running round in circles in my mind.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]A7[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]F#[/ch]
And it always seems that I'm following you, girl,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Esus4[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
Cause you take me to the places,That alone I'd never find.[/tab]


   [Pre Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]C#m7[/ch]
And even as I wander,I'm keeping you in sight.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A/C#[/ch]
You're a candle in the window,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Esus4[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
On a cold, dark winter's night.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
And I'm getting closer than I ever thought I     might.[/tab]


   [Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]
And I can't fight this feeling anymore.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Bm7[/ch]
I've forgotten what I started fighting for.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Bm7[/ch]
It's time to bring this ship into the shore,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
And throw away the oars, forever.[/tab]


   [Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Cause I can't fight this feeling anymore[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]Bm7[/ch]    
I've forgotten what I started fighting for.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Bm7[/ch]
And if I have to crawl upon the floor,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
Come crashing through your door,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Esus4[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
Baby, I can't fight this feeling anymore.[/tab]


   [Outro]
[ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E/A[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E/A[/ch]
[ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E/A[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]E/A[/ch]
[ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E/A[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D5[/ch]    [ch]E/A[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]

Mark W
